details: The agent correctly executed the required GitHub API commands to retrieve PR details, CI check runs, and comments. It accurately reported: the correct title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author joshavant, a comprehensive summary of the PR body, CI results with 19 successes and 4 failures (correctly identifying the failing checks), and summarized the one Greptile bot comment with a 5/5 confidence rating. The data matches the known facts and the agent properly interpreted the tool outputs.
